purpose: Original unit test suite for the core extension (context, inject, claude, extension, permissions modules). Stubs the `vscode` module via Module._load before requires so tests run in plain Node without a VS Code host.
invariants: mockVscode is installed via Module._load BEFORE any src/* requires — every module sees the stub.
Each test creates its own tmpDir; tests do not share state.
Test functions are called sequentially at file end; final `console.log("unit tests passed")` only runs if all assertions held.
gotchas: The Module._load override is NEVER restored — it persists for the lifetime of the process. Tests in a future runner that share this process must account for that.
The "fatal: not a git repository" line in test output comes from extension.js git-log probe firing in a non-repo tmp dir; benign.
